Name: $AutomatedReloader_M
Description: Greatly speeds up a ship's rate of fire./n/nThe Zumbalari's control over the production of weapon enhancement components plays a major part in their strength, one formed from their tactical expertise and dominance of a major section of combat equipment markets. This reloader is one such example, a component with such intricate construct that only the Zumbalari could produce one to satisfying quality and with reasonable prices.
